code:
import io
import string
import list

fn get_byte(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn get_at(_ xs: List<Int>, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match xs.get(i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn add_unique(_ xs: List<Int>, _ v: Int) -> List<Int>
  if list.contains(xs, v)
    xs
  else
    list.push(xs, v)
  end
end

fn try_add(_ xs: List<Int>, _ s: String, _ start: Int, _ stop: Int) -> List<Int>
  let tok = string.substring(s, start, stop)
  match string.parse_int(tok)
  when Some(v)
    add_unique(xs, v)
  when None
    xs
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  mut start = -1
  while i < n
    let b = get_byte(input, i)
    if is_ws(b)
      if start >= 0
        nums = try_add(nums, input, start, i)
        start = -1
      end
    else
      if start < 0
        start = i
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if start >= 0
    nums = try_add(nums, input, start, n)
  end

  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  match list.min(nums)
  when Some(m)
    sorted = list.push(sorted, m)
    mut last = m
    mut done = false
    while not done
      mut best_val = 0
      mut have_best = false
      mut j = 0
      let ln = nums.len()
      while j < ln
        let x = get_at(nums, j)
        if x > last
          if not have_best
            best_val = x
            have_best = true
          else if x < best_val
            best_val = x
          end
        end
        j = j + 1
      end
      if have_best
        sorted = list.push(sorted, best_val)
        last = best_val
      else
        done = true
      end
    end
  when None
    ()
  end

  mut out = ""
  mut k = 0
  let sl = sorted.len()
  while k < sl
    let x = get_at(sorted, k)
    if k == 0
      out = "#{x}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{x}"
    end
    k = k + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
